name: AVL List GmbH
h1: AVL List's GCC footprint in India
lede: AVL List runs two centers in New Delhi. New Delhi, covering R&D and IT, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AVL List office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AVL List GmbH GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AVL List runs 2 verified centers in New Delhi, covering R&D and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: AVL List's India footprint covers New Delhi, spanning R&D and IT. The centers deliver IT and R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all fourteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: AVL List runs R&D and 1 additional center types centers in India.
